prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of exactly two elegant young women lounging closely together on an ornate carved daybed inside a luxurious ancient palace chamber. They wear translucent Hanfu-inspired goddess dresses with delicate gold embroidery: the left woman in lavender purple sheer layered tulle with a high slit and long flowing sleeves, the right woman in champagne gold sheer gauze with embroidered bodice and draped sleeves. Both have long black hair styled in elaborate updos with dangling golden hairpins, floral ornaments, chains, tassels, earrings, necklaces, arm jewelry, and anklets; their faces are softly covered by plain rectangular blur masks for anonymity. Pose them reclining intimately, the left woman seated with one bare leg extended forward and the right woman leaning against her with both bare legs stretched across the couch, their arms relaxed and overlapping naturally. Set the scene in a dreamy opulent boudoir filled with purple silk cushions, brocade bedding, carved gold trim, gauzy violet canopy curtains, bronze incense burners, candle lanterns, hanging tassels, antique vases, and a foreground table with purple flowers and decorative objects. Use warm candlelit dusk lighting, rich violet and gold color grading, shallow depth of field, volumetric haze, sparkling dust motes, soft romantic atmosphere, ultra-detailed fabric texture, photorealistic skin, cinematic composition, high-end fantasy fashion photography, 9:16 aspect ratio.
